positive: A whimsical and modern scene featuring a stylized astronaut traversing a vibrant, bioluminescent forest landscape. The astronaut has a retro-futuristic suit with clean, bold lines and a detached helmet, reflecting an abstract nebula sky. The forest flora glows in complementary jewel tones (deep sapphire, emerald green, amethyst purple), contrasted against the matte white and silver of the suit. Strong overhead directional lighting emphasizes deep shadows and brilliant glows, creating a high contrast silhouette effect. Minimalist, graphic composition suitable for apparel print, vector art aesthetic, ultra-detailed, clean lines, symmetry.
negative: blurry, fuzzy, bad anatomy, watermark, signature, text, jpeg artifacts, noise, extra limbs, ugly, messy, grain, logos, writing, low detail
